findings.where: whole diagram — constellation A,B -> Union/Intersection/Difference/Symmetric difference
findings.detail: Operations map reads cleanly. All four operation labels and their operator subtitles ('A | B — in A or B', 'A & B — in both', 'A - B — in A not B', 'A ^ B — in exactly one') are legible at viewer width, no truncation. The 8 arrows from the two source sets fan out via basis curves and remain individually traceable — no tangle, so no crossings_illegible. Whitespace balanced, color tiers correct (Set A/B blue source tier, four ops purple auto tier). Accepted Mermaid approximation of a Venn; judged as an operations map.
